name: icicle-spear
description: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.
chineseDescription: 連續攻擊2～5次。

name: inferno
description: Burns the target.
chineseDescription: 讓目標陷入灼傷狀態。

name: infestation
description: Gives the target the Bound status, where the Pokémon takes 1/8 damage of its max HP at the end of every turn and it cannot switch out.
chineseDescription: 讓目標陷入束縛狀態，每回合結束時受到最大HP的1/8傷害，且無法替換。

name: heal-bell
description: The user cures the status conditions of all the Pokémon in its party, including itself, as well as its allies.
chineseDescription: 治癒包含自己與我方所有寶可夢的異常狀態。

name: heal-pulse
description: Restores 1/2 of the target's max HP.
chineseDescription: 回復目標最大HP的1/2。

name: healing-wish
description: The user faints. The Pokémon taking its place will have its HP fully restored and its status conditions cured.
chineseDescription: 使用者會陷入瀕死狀態。替換上場的寶可夢HP會完全回復，異常狀態也會被治癒。

name: howl
description: Boosts the Attack stats of the user and its allies by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 提高使用者和所有我方寶可夢的攻擊1個階段。

name: heat-wave
description: Has a 10% chance of burning targets.
chineseDescription: 有10%的機率會讓目標灼傷。

name: mean-look
description: Gives the target the Can't Escape status, where the Pokémon cannot be switched out.
chineseDescription: 讓目標陷入無法逃走狀態，無法替換。

name: headlong-rush
description: Lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 降低使用者的防禦和特防1個階段。

name: lash-out
description: This move's power is doubled if the user's stats were lowered during the turn this move is used.
chineseDescription: 如果使用者在該回合能力被降低，招式威力會加倍。

name: last-resort
description: This move fails unless the user has already used all the other moves it knows.
chineseDescription: 除非使用者已經使用過所有其他招式，否則招式會失敗。

name: lava-plume
description: Has a 30% chance of burning targets.
chineseDescription: 有30%的機率讓所有目標陷入灼傷狀態。

name: leaf-blade
description: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.
chineseDescription: 容易擊中要害。

name: leaf-storm
description: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 自己的特攻會大幅降低。

name: light-of-ruin
description: The user takes 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.
chineseDescription: 自己也會受到給予對手傷害的一半。

name: liquidation
description: Has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 有20%的機率讓對手的防禦降低1級。

name: low-kick
description: The heavier the target, the greater this move's power (ranging between 20 and 120).
chineseDescription: 對手越重，招式的威力就越大。

name: low-sweep
description: Lowers the target's Speed stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 對手的速度會降低1級。

name: lumina-crash
description: Lowers the target's Sp. Def stat by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 對手的特防會大幅降低。

name: lunge
description: Lowers the target's Attack stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 對手的攻擊會降低1級。

name: iron-defense
description: Boosts the user's Defense stat by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 自己的防禦會大幅提高。

name: kowtow-cleave
description: This move never misses.
chineseDescription: 這個招式必定會命中。

name: iron-tail
description: Has a 30% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 有30%的機率降低目標的防禦1個階段。

name: light-screen
description: Gives the user’s side the Light Screen status for 5 turns, where damage taken from special moves are reduced by 1/2 in Singles and 1/3 in Doubles.
chineseDescription: 在5回合內，我方場地會處於光牆狀態。光牆狀態下，我方寶可夢受到的特殊招式傷害會減半。

name: lock-on
description: The user gains the Locked On status. On the next turn after gaining the Locked On status, the Pokémon's move will not miss if targeting the Pokémon that was locked onto.
chineseDescription: 自己會進入鎖定狀態。在下一回合，自己使出的招式必定會命中被鎖定的對手。

name: magic-room
description: Gives the entire field the Magic Room status for 5 turns, where most held items will not work.
chineseDescription: 讓場地陷入奇妙空間狀態，持續5回合。期間大部分持有物效果消失。

name: magnetic-flux
description: If the user or its allies have the Plus Ability or the Minus Ability, their Defense and Sp. Def stats are boosted by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 若自己或我方寶可夢擁有正電或負電特性，則防禦和特防提高1個階段。

name: iron-head
description: Has a 20% chance of making the target flinch.
chineseDescription: 有20%機率讓對手畏縮。

name: meteor-mash
description: Has a 20% chance of boosting the user's Attack stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 有20%機率讓自己的攻擊提高1個階段。

name: mirror-coat
description: The user retaliates to deal double the damage it took from an opponent's special move during the turn this move is used.
chineseDescription: 在當回合受到對手特殊招式攻擊時，反彈2倍傷害。

name: misty-explosion
description: If the user is under the effect of Misty Terrain, this move's power is boosted by 50%. The user faints upon using this move.
chineseDescription: 若自己處於薄霧場地狀態，招式威力會提高50%。使用後自己會陷入瀕死狀態。

name: moonblast
description: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 有10%機率讓對手的特攻降低1個階段。

name: mountain-gale
description: Has a 30% chance of makingthe target flinch.
chineseDescription: 有30%機率讓對手畏縮。

name: mud-shot
description: Lowers the target's Speed stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 讓對手的速度降低1個階段。

name: mud-slap
description: Lowers the target's Accuracy stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 讓對手的命中率降低1個階段。

name: muddy-water
description: Has a 30% chance of lowering targets' accuracy by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 有30%機率讓對手的命中率降低1個階段。

name: mystical-fire
description: Lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 讓對手的特攻降低1個階段。

name: night-daze
description: Has a 40% chance of lowering the target's accuracy by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 有40%機率讓對手的命中率降低1個階段。

name: night-shade
description: Deals 50 HP of damage.
chineseDescription: 造成50點傷害。

name: night-slash
description: This move has a 1 stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.
chineseDescription: 容易擊中要害。

name: noble-roar
description: Lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 讓對手的攻擊和特攻降低1個階段。

name: nuzzle
description: Paralyzes the target.
chineseDescription: 讓對手陷入麻痺狀態。

name: overheat
description: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 自身特攻會大幅降低。

name: misty-terrain
description: Turns the entire field into Misty Terrain for 5 turns.
chineseDescription: 讓場地在5回合內變成薄霧場地。

name: morning-sun
description: Restores 1/2 of the user's max HP. In harsh sunlight, 2/3 of its max HP will be restored instead. In all other weather conditions, 1/4 of its max HP will be restored instead.
chineseDescription: 回復自身最大HP的1/2。在大晴天時會回復2/3，在其他天氣時則會回復1/4。

name: metal-sound
description: Lowers the target's Sp. Def stat by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 讓對手的特防降低2個階段。

name: nasty-plot
description: Boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 自身特攻會大幅提高。

name: pain-split
description: The user adds its remaining HP to the target's remaining HP, then splits the total in half for them to share.
chineseDescription: 自身和對手的剩餘HP合計後會平分。

name: perish-song
description: Gives all Pokémon on the field the Perishing status, where the Pokémon will faint 3 turns after gaining the status.
chineseDescription: 場上所有寶可夢在3回合後會陷入瀕死狀態。

name: metal-burst
description: The user retaliates to deal 150% of the damage it took from an opponent's move during the turn this move is used.
chineseDescription: 會以自身在該回合所受到的傷害的1.5倍來反擊。

name: pluck
description: If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats that Berry and gains its effect.
chineseDescription: 如果對手攜帶樹果，自身會吃掉該樹果並獲得其效果。

name: poison-fang
description: Has a 50% chance of badly poisoning the target.
chineseDescription: 有50%的機率會使對手陷入劇毒狀態。

name: poison-powder
description: Poisons the target.
chineseDescription: 會使對手陷入中毒狀態。

name: pollen-puff
description: When used on an ally, this move restores 1/2 of its max HP instead of dealing damage.
chineseDescription: 對我方寶可夢使用時，不會造成傷害，而是回復其最大HP的1/2。

name: poltergeist
description: This move fails if the target isn't holding an item
chineseDescription: 如果對手沒有攜帶道具，招式會失敗。

name: pounce
description: Lowers the target's Speed stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 降低對手1階段的速度。

name: power-trip
description: This move's power is increased by 20 for each stage that the user's stats have been boosted.
chineseDescription: 使用者能力提高的階段數越多，招式威力就越強，每提高1階段威力增加20。

name: psychic
description: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 有10%機率降低對手1階段的特防。

name: psychic-fangs
description: Removes the Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil statuses on the target's side.
chineseDescription: 解除對手場地上的光牆、反射壁和極光幕狀態。

name: psycho-cut
description: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.
chineseDescription: 容易擊中要害。

name: psyshield-bash
description: Boosts the user's Defense stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 提高使用者1階段的防禦。

name: quash
description: Causes the target to move last in the turn.
chineseDescription: 讓對手在本回合最後行動。

name: raging-bull
description: Removes the Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil statuses on the target's side. This move's type depends on the user's form.
chineseDescription: 解除對手場地上的光牆、反射壁和極光幕狀態。招式屬性會根據使用者的樣子而變化。

name: power-trick
description: The user gains the Atk/Def Swapped status, which swaps the Pokémon's Attack and Defense stats.
chineseDescription: 使用者陷入攻擊和防禦互換的狀態。

name: protect
description: The user protects itself from incoming moves for the turn. With each consecutive use, this move’s chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.
chineseDescription: 使用者在本回合中不會受到任何招式攻擊。連續使用會容易失敗。

name: psych-up
description: The user copies the target's stat changes.
chineseDescription: 使用者複製對手的能力變化。

name: play-rough
description: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Attack stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 有10%的機率會降低對手攻擊1級。

name: psychic-terrain
description: Turns the entire field into Psychic Terrain for 5 turns.
chineseDescription: 讓整個場地變成精神場地，持續5回合。

name: quick-guard
description: The user protects itself and its allies from priority moves for the turn.
chineseDescription: 保護自己和我方寶可夢，使其不受先制招式影響，持續1回合。

name: pin-missile
description: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.
chineseDescription: 連續攻擊2～5次。

name: reversal
description: The less HP the user has left, the greater this move's power (ranging between 20 and 200).
chineseDescription: 自己的HP越少，招式威力越大（威力20～200）。

name: rising-voltage
description: This move's power is doubled if the target is under the effect of Electric Terrain.
chineseDescription: 如果對手處於電氣場地狀態，招式威力會變成2倍。

name: rock-blast
description: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.
chineseDescription: 連續攻擊2～5次。

name: rock-slide
description: Has a 30% chance of making targets flinch.
chineseDescription: 有30%的機率讓對手畏縮。

name: rock-tomb
description: Lowers the target's Speed stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 降低對手速度1個階段。

name: sacred-sword
description: This move ignores the target's stat changes when dealing damage.
chineseDescription: 攻擊時會無視對手能力變化的影響。

name: scald
description: Has a 30% chance of burning the target. Cures the user and target of being frozen.
chineseDescription: 有30%的機率讓對手灼傷。能解除自己和對手的冰凍狀態。

name: scale-shot
description: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row. This move lowers the user's Defense stat by 1 stage and boosts its Speed stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 連續攻擊2～5次。使用後會降低自己防禦1個階段，並提高自己速度1個階段。

name: scary-face
description: Lowers the target's Speed stat by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 降低對手速度2個階段。

name: scorching-sands
description: Has a 30% chance of burning the target. Cures the user and target of being frozen.
chineseDescription: 有30%的機率讓對手灼傷。能解除自己和對手的冰凍狀態。

name: screech
description: Lowers the target's Defense stat by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 降低對手防禦2個階段。

name: seismic-toss
description: Deals 50 HP of damage.
chineseDescription: 造成50點HP的傷害。

name: rain-dance
description: Summons rain for 5 turns.
chineseDescription: 在5回合內降下雨。

name: recycle
description: Regenerates the last held item that the user consumed. The user then holds this item once more.
chineseDescription: 讓自己再次持有已消耗掉的道具。

name: reflect-type
description: The user becomes the same type or types as the target.
chineseDescription: 讓自己的屬性變得和目標相同。

name: razor-shell
description: Has a 50% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 有50%的機率降低對手防禦1個階段。

name: roar
description: If there are other Pokémon in the target’s party that can switch into battle, the target is forced to switch out of battle and is replaced by one of those Pokémon at random.
chineseDescription: 強制目標替換寶可夢。若目標沒有可替換的寶可夢則會失敗。

name: rock-polish
description: Boosts the user's Speed stat by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 讓自己的速度能力提高2個階段。

name: role-play
description: Changes the user's Ability to be the same as the target's.
chineseDescription: 讓自己的特性變得和目標相同。

name: safeguard
description: Gives the user's side the Safeguard status for 5 turns, where the Pokémon is immune to status conditions and cannot become confused.
chineseDescription: 在5回合內，讓自己這一方進入神秘守護狀態，不會陷入異常狀態和混亂。

name: sandstorm
description: Summons a sandstorm for 5 turns.
chineseDescription: 在5回合內掀起沙暴。

name: shell-side-arm
description: Has a 20% chance of poisoning the target. Becomes a physical move if that will deal more damage.
chineseDescription: 有20%的機率讓目標陷入中毒狀態。若物理招式傷害更高，則會變成物理招式。

name: simple-beam
description: Changes the target's Ability to Simple.
chineseDescription: 讓目標的特性變成單純。

name: sing
description: Puts the target to sleep.
chineseDescription: 讓目標陷入睡眠狀態。

name: skitter-smack
description: Lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 降低對手特攻1階。

name: sleep-powder
description: Puts the target to sleep.
chineseDescription: 使對手陷入睡眠狀態。

name: sludge-bomb
description: Has a 30% chance of poisoning the target.
chineseDescription: 有30%的機率使對手陷入中毒狀態。

name: snarl
description: Lowers targets' Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 降低周圍寶可夢的特攻1階。

name: snore
description: Can be used only if the user is asleep. Has a 30% chance of making the target flinch.
chineseDescription: 只有在自己陷入睡眠狀態時才能使用。有30%的機率使對手畏縮。

name: soak
description: Changes the target's type to Water.
chineseDescription: 將對手的屬性變為水屬性。

name: sparkling-aria
description: Cures targets of their burns.
chineseDescription: 治癒周圍寶可夢的灼傷狀態。

name: sleep-talk
description: Can be used only if the user is asleep. The user uses one of the other moves it knows at random.
chineseDescription: 只有在自己陷入睡眠狀態時才能使用。會隨機使出自己學會的其他招式。

name: smart-strike
description: This move never misses.
chineseDescription: 必定命中。

name: snowscape
description: Summons snow for 5 turns.
chineseDescription: 讓天氣在５回合內變為下雪。

name: shadow-claw
description: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.
chineseDescription: 容易擊中要害。

name: speed-swap
description: The user and the target swap their Speed stats.
chineseDescription: 和目標交換速度能力。

name: spicy-extract
description: Lowers the target's Defense stat by 2 stages and boosts its Attack stat by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 讓目標的防禦降低２階段，攻擊提高２階段。

name: shadow-ball
description: Has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 有２０％的機率讓目標的特防降低１階段。

name: steel-beam
description: After attacking, the user takes damage equal to 1/2 of its max HP.
chineseDescription: 攻擊後，自己會受到最大ＨＰ１／２的傷害。

name: steel-wing
description: Has a 10% chance of boosting the user's Defense stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 有１０％的機率讓自己的防禦提高１階段。

name: stone-edge
description: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost:
chineseDescription: 容易擊中要害。

name: stored-power
description: This move's power is increased by20 for each stage that the user's stats have been boosted.
chineseDescription: 自己的能力每提高１階段，招式威力就會增加２０。

name: storm-throw
description: Always a critical hit.
chineseDescription: 必定會擊中要害。

name: string-shot
description: Lowers targets' Speed stats by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 讓目標的速度降低２階段。

name: struggle-bug
description: Lowers targets' Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 讓目標的特攻降低１階段。

name: stun-spore
description: Paralyzes the target.
chineseDescription: 讓目標麻痺。

name: sucker-punch
description: This move fails unless the target has chosen an attack and has not yet attacked during the turn this move is used.
chineseDescription: 只有在目標選擇攻擊招式且尚未行動時才能成功。

name: superpower
description: Lowers the user's Attack and Defense stats by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 讓自己的攻擊和防禦降低１階段。

name: surf
description: This move's power is doubled against targets that have the Submerged status.
chineseDescription: 攻擊潛水狀態的對手時，招式威力會變成２倍。

name: swagger
description: Boosts the target's Attack stat by 2 stages and confuses it.
chineseDescription: 讓對手的攻擊提高２階段，並陷入混亂狀態。

name: spiky-shield
description: The user protects itself from incoming moves for the turn. Any attackers that use contact moves against the user during this turn take damage equal to 1/8 of their max HP. With each consecutive use, this move's chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.
chineseDescription: 保護自己，不受到招式攻擊。如果受到接觸招式攻擊，對手會受到最大ＨＰ１／８的傷害。連續使用會容易失敗。

name: stealth-rock
description: Gives the opponent's side the Stealth Rock status, where Pokémon that switch into battle will take damage equal to 1/8 of their max HP. This damage differs depending on the Pokémon's type matchup with the Rock type.
chineseDescription: 在對手場地撒下隱形岩。登場的寶可夢會受到傷害，傷害量會依屬性相剋而不同。

name: sticky-web
description: Gives the opponent's side the Sticky Web status, where Pokémon that switch into battle will have their Speed stats lowered by 1 stage. Pokémon such as Flying types or ones with the Levitate Ability are unaffected.
chineseDescription: 在對手場地撒下黏黏網。登場的寶可夢速度會降低１階段。飛行屬性或飄浮特性的寶可夢不受影響。

name: stockpile
description: Boosts the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage. Raises the user's Stockpiling level by 1. Can be used up to 3 times.
chineseDescription: 提高自己的防禦和特防１階段。蓄力等級會提高１級。最多可使用３次。

name: spite
description: Removes 4 PP from the move last used by the target.
chineseDescription: 讓目標最後使用的招式ＰＰ減少４。

name: substitute
description: The user loses 1/4 of its max HP to create a substitute. The substitute will be hit by moves instead of the user, and it will vanish when it takes damage equal to 1/4 of the user's max HP.
chineseDescription: 損失自己最大ＨＰ的１／４，製作替身。替身會代替自己承受招式，受到相當於自己最大ＨＰ１／４的傷害後會消失。

name: sunny-day
description: Summons harsh sunlight for 5 turns.
chineseDescription: 在５回合內，天氣會變成大晴天。

name: spit-up
description: The higher the user's Stockpiling level, the greater this move's power (ranging between 100 and 300). This move fails unless the user has the Stockpiling status.
chineseDescription: 蓄力等級越高，招式威力會提高（威力１００～３００）。沒有蓄力狀態時會失敗。

name: syrup-bomb
description: eed
chineseDescription: 向對手噴灑黏稠的糖漿。３回合內，對手的速度會降低１階段。

name: taunt
description: Gives the target the Taunted status, where the Pokémon can only use attacks.
chineseDescription: 讓對手陷入挑釁狀態，３回合內只能使用攻擊招式。

name: thief
description: If the user is not already holding an item, it steals the target's held item.
chineseDescription: 自己沒有攜帶道具時，偷走對手攜帶的道具。

name: thrash
description: The user gains the Rampaging status, where for 2-3 turns the Pokémon continues its attack and is unable to take any other actions. After that, it becomes confused.
chineseDescription: ２～３回合內會橫衝直撞地持續攻擊，無法進行其他行動。之後會陷入混亂狀態。

name: throat-chop
description: Gives the target the Throat Chopped status, where the Pokémon cannot use any sound-based moves for 2 turns.
chineseDescription: 讓對手陷入喉嚨發炎狀態，２回合內無法使用聲音招式。

name: thunder-fang
description: Has a 10% chance of paralyzing the target and a 10% chance of making the target flinch.
chineseDescription: 有10%機率讓目標陷入麻痺狀態，並有10%機率讓目標畏縮。

name: thunder-punch
description: Has a 10% chance of paralyzing the target.
chineseDescription: 有10%機率讓目標陷入麻痺狀態。

name: thunder-wave
description: Paralyzes the target.
chineseDescription: 讓目標陷入麻痺狀態。

name: thunderbolt
description: Has a 10% chance of paralyzing the target.
chineseDescription: 有10%機率讓目標陷入麻痺狀態。

name: tickle
description: Lowers the target's Attack and Defense stats by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 降低目標的攻擊和防禦各1個階段。

name: torch-song
description: Boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 提高自己的特攻1個階段。

name: toxic
description: Badly poisons the target. If the user is a Poison type, this move will never miss.
chineseDescription: 讓目標陷入劇毒狀態。如果自己是毒屬性，則必定命中。

name: trailblaze
description: Boosts the user's Speed stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 提高自己的速度1個階段。

name: tri-attack
description: Has a 20% chance of leaving the target burned, frozen, or paralyzed.
chineseDescription: 有20%機率讓目標陷入灼傷、冰凍或麻痺狀態。

name: swords-dance
description: Boosts the user's Attack stat by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 大幅提高自己的攻擊2個階段。

name: tailwind
description: Gives the user's side the Tailwind status, where the Pokémon's Speed stat is doubled, for 4 turns.
chineseDescription: 讓自己場上的寶可夢在4回合內速度加倍。

name: tearful-look
description: Lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage. This move ignores the target's evasiveness and can hit a target using a move such as Protect.
chineseDescription: 降低目標的攻擊和特攻各1個階段。無視目標的閃避率，可擊中守住等狀態的寶可夢。

name: tail-slap
description: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.
chineseDescription: 連續攻擊２～５次。

name: teatime
description: Causes all Pokémon on the field to eat their held Berries.
chineseDescription: 讓場上所有寶可夢吃掉各自攜帶的樹果。

name: transform
description: The user transforms into a copy of the target. It also copies all of the target's stats apart from its HP.
chineseDescription: 變身成目標的樣子。除了HP以外，會複製目標所有的能力。

name: switcheroo
description: The user and the target swap their held items.
chineseDescription: 和目標交換各自攜帶的道具。

name: trop-kick
description: Lowers the target's Attack stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 降低目標的攻擊1個階段。

name: twin-beam
description: The user attacks twice in a row.
chineseDescription: 連續攻擊2次。

name: u-turn
description: After attacking, the user switchesout of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon.
chineseDescription: 攻擊後，使用者會和同行寶可夢進行替換。

name: upper-hand
description: Makes the target flinch. This move fails if the target isn't about to use a priority move.
chineseDescription: 讓目標畏縮。若目標未準備使用先制招式，招式將會失敗。

name: venoshock
description: This move's power is doubled if the target is poisoned or badly poisoned.
chineseDescription: 如果目標處於中毒或劇毒狀態，招式威力會變成2倍。

name: volt-switch
description: After attacking, the user switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon.
chineseDescription: 攻擊後，使用者會和同行寶可夢進行替換。

name: volt-tackle
description: Has a 10% chance of paralyzing the target. The user also takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.
chineseDescription: 有10%的機率讓目標麻痺。使用者也會受到招式造成傷害的1/3。

name: water-pulse
description: Has a 20% chance of confusing the target.
chineseDescription: 有20%的機率讓目標混亂。

name: water-shuriken
description: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.
chineseDescription: 連續攻擊2～5次。

name: waterfall
description: Has a 20% chance of making the target flinch.
chineseDescription: 有20%的機率讓目標畏縮。

name: wild-charge
description: The user takes 1/4 of the damage dealt by this move.
chineseDescription: 使用者也會受到招式造成傷害的1/4。

name: will-o-wisp
description: Burns the target.
chineseDescription: 讓目標灼傷。

name: wood-hammer
description: The user takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.
chineseDescription: 使用者也會受到招式造成傷害的1/3。

name: worry-seed
description: Changes the target's Ability to Insomnia.
chineseDescription: 將目標的特性變為不眠。

name: zap-cannon
description: Paralyzes the target.
chineseDescription: 讓目標陷入麻痺狀態。

name: trick-room
description: Gives the entire field the Trick Room status, where Pokémon with lower Speed stats move first, for 5 turns.
chineseDescription: 讓整個場地陷入戲法空間狀態，持續5回合，速度較低的寶可夢會先行動。

name: whirlwind
description: If there are other Pokémon in the target's party that can switch into battle, the target is forced to switch out of battle and is replaced by one of those Pokémon at random.
chineseDescription: 強制目標替換，並隨機替換出1隻寶可夢。

name: wide-guard
description: During the turn this move is used, the user protects its side from moves that target all allies.
chineseDescription: 在這回合中，保護我方全體，使其不受到攻擊全體寶可夢的招式影響。

name: wonder-room
description: Gives the entire field the Wonder Room status, where Pokémon's Defense and Sp. Def stats are swapped, for 5 turns.
chineseDescription: 讓整個場地陷入奇妙空間狀態，持續5回合，寶可夢的防禦和特防能力會互換。

name: yawn
description: Makes the target drowsy. This move never misses.
chineseDescription: 讓目標陷入瞌睡狀態。招式必定命中。

name: triple-arrows
description: Has a 50% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat by 1 stage and has a 30% chance of making the target flinch. This move has a I-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.
chineseDescription: 有50%機率讓目標的防禦能力下降1階段。有30%機率讓目標畏縮。容易擊中要害。

name: acid-spray
description: Lowers the target's Sp. Def stat by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 讓目標的特防能力下降2階段。

name: charm
description: Lowers the target's Attack stat by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 讓目標的攻擊能力下降2階段。

name: circle-throw
description: If there are other Pokémon in the target's party that can switch into battle, the target is forced to switch out of battle and is replaced by one of those Pokémon at random.
chineseDescription: 強制目標替換，並隨機替換出1隻寶可夢。

name: energy-ball
description: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target’s Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 有10%機率讓目標的特防能力下降1階段。

name: eruption
description: The less HP the user has left, the lower this move's power (ranging between 1 and 150).
chineseDescription: 使用者剩餘HP越少，招式威力越低。(威力介於1～150)

name: fly
description: The user gains the Sky-High status on the turn this move is used, where the Pokémon cannot be hit my most moves and is unaffected by terrain, then attacks on the following turn.
chineseDescription: 飛到高空，大部分招式都無法命中，也不受場地狀態影響。下一回合發動攻擊。

name: head-smash
description: The user takes 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.
chineseDescription: 自身也會受到招式造成傷害的1/2。

name: ingrain
description: The user gains the Ingrained status, where the Pokémon has 1/16 of its max HP restored at the end of every turn and becomes grounded and cannot be switched out of battle.
chineseDescription: 自身紮根於地面，每回合結束時回復自身最大HP的1/16，但無法替換寶可夢。

name: leech-seed
description: Gives the target the Leech Seeded status, where Pokémon takes damage equal to 1/16 of its max HP at the end of every turn. Whichever Pokémon is in the spot of the Pokémon that caused the status has its HP restored by the same amount.
chineseDescription: 讓對手陷入寄生種子狀態。對手每回合結束時會損失最大HP的1/16，自身則會回復相同量的HP。

name: memento
description: Lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 2 stages. The user faints upon using this move.
chineseDescription: 大幅降低對手的攻擊和特攻能力。自身會陷入瀕死狀態。

name: petal-dance
description: The user gains the Rampaging status, where for 2-3 turns the Pokémon continues its attack and is unable to take any other actions. After that, it becomes confused.
chineseDescription: 自身會連續攻擊2～3回合。期間無法採取其他行動。之後會陷入混亂狀態。

name: raging-fury
description: The user gains the Rampaging status, where for 2-3 turns the Pokémon continues its attack and is unable to take any other actions. After that, it becomes confused.
chineseDescription: 自身會連續攻擊2～3回合。期間無法採取其他行動。之後會陷入混亂狀態。

name: self-destruct
description: The user faints upon using this move.
chineseDescription: 自身會陷入瀕死狀態。

name: zen-headbutt
description: Has a 20% chance of making the target flinch.
chineseDescription: 有20%的機率讓對手畏縮。

name: spirit-shackle
description: Gives the target the Can't Escape status, where the Pokémon cannot be switched out.
chineseDescription: 讓目標陷入無法替換下場的狀態。

name: supercell-slam
description: If this move misses or fails, the user takes damage equal to 1/2 of its max HP. If the target has the Minimized status, this move's power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.
chineseDescription: 若未命中或失敗，使用者會受到自身最大HP一半的傷害。若目標處於變小狀態，招式威力會加倍且必定命中。

name: sweet-kiss
description: Confuses the target.
chineseDescription: 讓目標陷入混亂狀態。

name: sweet-scent
description: Lowers targets' evasiveness by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 大幅降低目標的閃避率。

name: torment
description: Gives the target the Unable to Repeat status, where the Pokémon cannot use the same move twice in a row.
chineseDescription: 讓目標陷入無法連續使出相同招式的狀態。

name: trick-or-treat
description: Gives the target the Trick-or-Treating status, where the Pokémon gains a Ghost typing.
chineseDescription: 讓目標增加幽靈屬性。

name: alluring-voice
description: Confuses the target if its stats were boosted during the turn this move is used.
chineseDescription: 如果對手在這回合能力提高，會讓對手陷入混亂狀態。

name: assurance
description: This move's power is doubled if the target has already taken damage during the turn this move is used.
chineseDescription: 如果對手在這回合已經受到傷害，招式威力會變成2倍。

name: acupressure
description: Boosts the Attack, Defense, Sp.Atk, Sp. Def, Speed, accuracy, or evasiveness of the user or an ally by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 會讓自己或我方寶可夢的攻擊、防禦、特攻、特防、速度、命中率或閃避率其中一項能力提高2階段。

name: aurora-veil
description: Gives the user's side the Aurora Veil status for 5 turns, where damage from physical and special moves are reduced by 1/2 in Singles or 1/3 in Doubles. This move can be used only in snow.
chineseDescription: 讓自己場地處於極光幕狀態5回合，減輕我方寶可夢受到的物理和特殊招式傷害。只能在下雪天氣下使用。

name: body-press
description: The damage dealt by this move is calculated using the user's Defense stat instead of its Attack stat.
chineseDescription: 招式傷害會以自己的防禦能力來計算。

name: heavy-slam
description: The more the user outweighs the target, the greater this move's power (ranging between 40 and 120). If the target has the Minimized status, this move's power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.
chineseDescription: 自身比對手越重，招式威力越大。（威力40～120）如果對手處於變小狀態，招式威力會加倍，且必定命中。

name: outrage
description: The user gains the Rampaging status, where for 2-3 turns the Pokémon continues its attack and is unable to take any other actions. After that, it becomes confused.
chineseDescription: 自身會連續攻擊2～3回合。期間無法採取其他行動。之後會陷入混亂狀態。

name: smack-down
description: If the target is off the ground, it gains the Landed status, where the Pokémon is now grounded and can be affected by Ground-type moves. This move can hit a target that has the Sky-High status.
chineseDescription: 如果對手處於空中，會被強制落地，並能受到地面屬性招式的影響。可以命中處於飛翔狀態的對手。

name: toxic-spikes
description: Gives the opponent's side the Toxic Spikes status, where Pokémon that are not Flying-types or have the Levitate ability that switch into battle will be poisoned or badly poisoned if there are two instances.
chineseDescription: 在對手場地灑下毒菱。非飛行屬性或不具備飄浮特性的寶可夢替換上場時會中毒。若場上存在2層，則會劇毒。

name: sky-attack
description: The user gains the Charging status, where the Pokémon spends 1 turn charging before using a move on the turn this move is used, then attacks on the following turn. This move has a 30% chance of making the target flinch, and it has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.
chineseDescription: 第1回合蓄力，第2回合攻擊。有30%的機率讓目標畏縮。容易擊中要害。

name: bounce
description: The user gains the Sky-High status on the turn this move is used, where the Pokémon cannot be hit my most moves and is unaffected by terrain, then attacks on the following turn. This move has a 30% chance of paralyzing the target.
chineseDescription: 第1回合跳上高空，第2回合攻擊。在空中時，寶可夢不會受到大部分招式的攻擊，也不受場地狀態影響。有30%機率讓目標陷入麻痺狀態。

name: charge
description: Boosts the user's Sp. Def stat by 1 stage. The user gains the Electric Boost status, where the power of the Pokémon's next Electric-type move will be doubled.
chineseDescription: 提高自己的特防1個階段。下回合使用的電屬性招式威力會變成2倍。

name: belch
description: This move fails unless the userhas eaten a Berry during the battle.
chineseDescription: 除非使用者在對戰中吃過樹果，否則招式會失敗。

name: clangorous-soul
description: The user loses 1/3 of its max HP to boost its Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats by 1 stage. This move fails if the user doesn't have enough remaining HP.
chineseDescription: 自己的HP減少最大HP的1/3，但攻擊、防禦、特攻、特防和速度會各提升1個階段。若HP不足則招式會失敗。

name: cross-poison
description: Has a 10% chance of poisoning the target. This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.
chineseDescription: 有10%機率使目標中毒。容易擊中要害。

name: chilly-reception
description: Summons snow for 5 turns. The user switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon.
chineseDescription: 在５回合內降下雪。使用者會和後備寶可夢進行替換。

name: cosmic-power
description: Boosts the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 提高自己的防禦和特防１階段。

name: destiny-bond
description: The user gains the Destiny Bound status, where if the Pokémon is knocked out by an opponent, that opponent will also be knocked out. This move fails if used in succession.
chineseDescription: 如果使用者在下個回合內被擊倒，擊倒自己的對手也會被擊倒。連續使用會失敗。

name: dynamic-punch
description: Confuses the target.
chineseDescription: 會使對手陷入混亂狀態。

name: earthquake
description: This move’s power is doubled against targets that have the Underground status. When Grassy Terrain is active, this move’s power is halved.
chineseDescription: 對於潛入地底的對手，威力會變為2倍。在青草場地時，威力會減半。

name: endeavor
description: Deals damage to the target equal to its remaining HP minus the user's remaining HP. This move fails if the target's HP is the same as or lower than the user's.
chineseDescription: 讓對手的HP變得和自己的HP一樣。如果對手的HP比自己的HP低或相同，招式就會失敗。

name: expanding-force
description: If the user is under the effect of Psychic Terrain, this move's power is boosted by 50% and its range extends to all opponents.
chineseDescription: 若使用者處於精神場地狀態，招式威力會提高50%，且會攻擊所有對手。

name: feint
description: This move can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect and removes the effects of those moves.
chineseDescription: 可以擊中處於守住或看穿狀態的對手，並解除其效果。

name: fire-fang
description: Has a 10% chance of burning the target and a 10% chance of making the target flinch.
chineseDescription: 有10%的機率讓對手陷入灼傷狀態或畏縮。

name: first-impression
description: This move fails unless it is the first move used by the user after it enters a battle.
chineseDescription: 只有在使用者出場後，第1次使出招式時才能成功。

name: fling
description: This move's power and effects depend on the user's held item. The held item is lost after this move is used.
chineseDescription: 招式的威力和效果會依據自己持有的道具而改變。使用後道具會消失。

name: frenzy-plant
description: The user gains the Recharging status on the turn after this move is used, where the user cannot take any actions for 1 turn.
chineseDescription: 使用後，下個回合自己將無法動彈。

name: grass-knot
description: The heavier the target, the greater this move’s power (ranging between 20 and 120).
chineseDescription: 目標越重，招式威力越大。(威力20～120)

name: gyro-ball
description: The lower the user's Speed stat compared to the target's, the greater this move's power (ranging between 1 and 150).
chineseDescription: 自己的速度比目標越慢，招式威力越大。(威力1～150)

name: growth
description: Boosts the user's Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage. In harsh sunlight, these stats will be boosted by 2 stages instead.
chineseDescription: 提高自己1階段的攻擊和特攻。在大晴天狀態下，會提高2階段。

name: flying-press
description: The damage dealt by this move is calculated by combining the effectiveness of the move's own type with that of the Flying type. If the target has the Minimized status, this move's power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.
chineseDescription: 傷害會同時受到招式本身的屬性與飛行屬性的屬性相剋影響。若目標處於變小狀態，招式威力會加倍，且必定命中。

name: hurricane
description: Has a 30% chance of confusing the target. This move never misses in rain and can hit a target that has the Sky-High status.
chineseDescription: 有30%的機率會讓目標混亂。下雨時招式必定命中，且能擊中處於飛翔狀態的目標。

name: icicle-crash
description: Has a 30% chance of making the target flinch.
chineseDescription: 有30%的機率會讓目標畏縮。

name: infernal-parade
description: Has a 30% chance of burning the target. This move's power is doubled if the target has a status condition.
chineseDescription: 有30%的機率讓目標陷入灼傷狀態。如果目標陷入異常狀態，招式威力會加倍。

name: helping-hand
description: Boosts the power of an ally’s move by 50% during the turn this move is used.
chineseDescription: 在該回合，提高我方寶可夢招式的威力50%。

name: knock-off
description: This move’s power is boosted by 50% if the target is holding an item. Causes the target to lose its held item.
chineseDescription: 如果目標持有道具，招式威力會提高50%，並讓目標失去持有的道具。

name: leech-life
description: The user's HP is restored by 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.
chineseDescription: 給予對手的傷害會有一半轉化為自己的HP。

name: magic-powder
description: Changes the target's type to Psychic.
chineseDescription: 讓對手的屬性變成超能力屬性。

name: magnet-rise
description: The user gains the Magnet Rise status, where it makes the user float off the ground. The Pokemon becomes immuned to Ground-type moves, as well as Spikes and other hazards.
chineseDescription: 讓自己陷入磁浮狀態，飄浮在空中。不受地面屬性招式和撒菱等場地狀態影響。

name: mortal-spin
description: Removes the Bound and Leech Seeded statuses from the user and removes the Sticky Web, Stealth Rock, Spikes, and Toxic Spikes statuses from the user's side. Poisons targets.
chineseDescription: 解除自己被束縛和寄生種子的狀態，並解除我方場地的黏黏網、隱形岩、撒菱和毒菱狀態。讓對手陷入中毒狀態。

name: parabolic-charge
description: The user's HP is restored by 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.
chineseDescription: 造成傷害的1/2會回復自身HP。

name: minimize
description: Boosts the user's evasiveness by 2 stages. The user gains the Minimized status, where moves such as Supercell Slam, Body Slam, Dragon Rush, Flying Press, Heat Crash, and Heavy Slam will not miss the Pokémon and will deal double damage.
chineseDescription: 自身的閃避率會大幅提高。處於變小狀態時，部分招式會命中且威力變為2倍。

name: poison-jab
description: Has a 30% chance of poisoning the target.
chineseDescription: 有30%的機率會使對手陷入中毒狀態。

name: population-bomb
description: The user attacks 1 to 10 times in a row. The attack ends if the user misses.
chineseDescription: 連續攻擊1～10次。如果攻擊沒有命中，招式就會結束。

name: psychic-noise
description: Gives the target the Healing Prevented status, where the Pokémon is unable to restore HP from moves, abilities, or held items, for 2 turns.
chineseDescription: 讓對手陷入無法回復HP的狀態，持續2回合。陷入此狀態的寶可夢無法透過招式、特性或道具回復HP。

name: power-split
description: The user adds its Attack stat to the target's Attack stat, then splits the total in half for them to share. It does the same with each of their Sp. Atk stats.
chineseDescription: 將使用者和對手的攻擊相加後平分。特攻也會以相同方式平分。

name: quiver-dance
description: Boosts the user's Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 提高自己的特攻、特防和速度各1個階段。

name: rock-wrecker
description: The user gains the Recharging status on the turn after this move is used, where the user cannot take any actions for 1 turn.
chineseDescription: 使用招式後，下回合自己將無法動彈。

name: sand-tomb
description: Gives the target the Bound status, where the Pokémon takes 1/8 damage of its max HP at the end of every turn and it cannot switch out.
chineseDescription: 讓對手陷入束縛狀態。每回合結束時會損失最大HP的1/8，且無法逃走或替換。

name: recover
description: Restores 1/2 of the user's max HP.
chineseDescription: 回復自己HP最大值的1/2。

name: reflect
description: Gives the user's side the Reflect status for 5 turns, where damage taken from physical moves are reduced by 1/2 in Singles and 1/3 in Doubles.
chineseDescription: 在5回合內，讓自己這一方進入反射壁狀態，物理招式的傷害會減半。雙打對戰時則會變成1/3。

name: roost
description: Restores 1/2 of the user's max HP. If the user is a Flying type, it will lose the Flying type for the turn.
chineseDescription: 回復自己HP最大值的1/2。若自己是飛行屬性，該回合會失去飛行屬性。

name: rapid-spin
description: Removes the Bound and Leech Seeded statuses from the user and removes the Sticky Web, Stealth Rock, Spikes, and Toxic Spikes statuses from the user's side. Boosts the user's Speed stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 解除自己被束縛和寄生種子的狀態。解除自己這一方的黏黏網、隱形岩、撒菱和毒菱狀態。讓自己的速度能力提高1個階段。

name: snap-trap
description: Gives the target the Bound status, where the Pokémon takes 1/8 damage of its max HP at the end of every turn and it cannot switch out.
chineseDescription: 使對手陷入束縛狀態，每回合結束時會受到最大HP的1/8傷害，且無法替換。

name: shadow-punch
description: This move never misses.
chineseDescription: 必定命中。

name: sheer-cold
description: Knocks out the target. This move does not affect Ice types. The accuracy of this move is fixed at 30%. If used by Pokémon other than Ice types, the accuracy of this move is 20%.
chineseDescription: 一擊必殺招式。冰屬性的寶可夢不會受到影響。招式命中率為30%。若使用者不是冰屬性，命中率會變為20%。

name: shell-smash
description: Lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage and boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 降低自己的防禦和特防1階，並提高自己的攻擊、特攻和速度2階。

name: shelter
description: Boosts the user's Defense stat by 2 stages.
chineseDescription: 提高自己的防禦2階。

name: skill-swap
description: The user and the target swap their Abilities.
chineseDescription: 和對手交換特性。

name: slack-off
description: Restores 1/2 of the user's max HP.
chineseDescription: 回復自己最大HP的1/2。

name: stomping-tantrum
description: This move’s power is doubled if the user couldn’t act or its move missed or failed on the previous turn.
chineseDescription: 如果自己在上個回合未能行動，或招式未命中或失敗，招式威力會變為２倍。

name: strength-sap
description: Restores the user's HP by an amount equal to the target's Attack stat. Lowers the target's Attack stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 回復自己相當於目標攻擊的ＨＰ。讓目標的攻擊降低１階段。

name: super-fang
description: Deals damage to the target equal to 1/2 of its remaining HP. Deals 1 HP of damage to a target that has only 1 HP left.
chineseDescription: 讓目標的ＨＰ變成１／２。如果目標的ＨＰ只有１，則會造成１點傷害。

name: stuff-cheeks
description: The user eats its held Berry and boosts its Defense stat by 2 stages. This move can't be used if the user is not holding a Berry.
chineseDescription: 吃掉自己攜帶的樹果，並讓防禦提高２階段。沒有攜帶樹果時無法使用。

name: terrain-pulse
description: This move’s power is doubled if the user is under the effect of a terrain. This move’s type depends on the terrain.
chineseDescription: 場地處於場地狀態時，招式威力會變成２倍。招式屬性會依場地狀態而改變。

name: thunder
description: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing the target. This move never misses in rain and can hit a target that has the Sky-High status.
chineseDescription: 有30%機率讓目標陷入麻痺狀態。下雨時必定命中。可擊中處於飛翔狀態的寶可夢。

name: toxic-thread
description: Lowers the target's Speed stat by 2 stages and poisons it.
chineseDescription: 降低目標的速度2個階段，並讓目標陷入中毒狀態。

name: swallow
description: The higher the user's Stockpiling level, the more HP the user restores. Level 1: 1/4 of the user's max HP is restored. Level 2: 1/2 of the user's max HP is restored. Level 3: The user's HP is fully restored. This move fails unless the user has the Stockpiling status.
chineseDescription: 隨著自己蓄力的階段，回復的HP量會增加。蓄力1階段時回復1/4最大HP，2階段時回復1/2最大HP，3階段時回復所有HP。若沒有蓄力，則會失敗。

name: tidy-up
description: Removes the Sticky Web, Stealth Rock, Substitute, Spikes, and Toxic Spikes statuses from the entire field. Boosts the user's Attack and Speed stats by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 清除場上所有黏黏網、撒菱、毒菱、隱形岩和替身。提高自己的攻擊和速度各1個階段。

name: triple-axel
description: The user attacks 3 times in a row-first with a power of 20, then with a power of 40, then with a power of 60. The attack ends if the user misses.
chineseDescription: 攻擊3次。第1次威力20，第2次威力40，第3次威力60。若攻擊落空，招式將會結束。

name: water-spout
description: The less HP the user has left, the lower this move's power (ranging between 1 and 150).
chineseDescription: 使用者剩餘的HP越少，招式威力就越低（威力介於1～150）。

name: weather-ball
description: When a weather condition is present, this move’s power is doubled and its type changes. Harsh sunlight: Fire type. Rain: Water type. Snow: Ice type. Sandstorm: Rock type.
chineseDescription: 天氣狀況存在時，招式威力會變成2倍，屬性也會改變。大晴天：火屬性。下雨：水屬性。下雪：冰屬性。沙暴：岩石屬性。

name: wrap
description: Gives the target the Bound status, where the Pokémon takes 1/8 damage of its max HP at the end of every turn and it cannot switch out.
chineseDescription: 讓目標陷入束縛狀態，每回合結束時會受到最大HP的1/8傷害，且無法替換。

name: last-respects
description: This move's power is increased by 50 for each time that a Pokémon in the user's party has fainted.
chineseDescription: 我方寶可夢每有一隻陷入瀕死狀態，招式威力就會提高50。

name: wish
description: Gives the user's spot the Wish status. At the end of the next turn after the Wish status is activated, the HP of the Pokémon in the affected spot will be restored by 1/2 of the max HP of the Pokémon that caused the status.
chineseDescription: 讓使用者所在的位置陷入祈願狀態。下回合結束時，該位置的寶可夢HP會回復最大HP的1/2。

name: chilling-water
description: Lowers the target's Attack stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 降低目標的攻擊１階段。

name: beat-up
description: The target is attacked as many times as the number of Pokémon in the user's party. Pokémon that have fainted or have a status condition are not counted. This move's power is calculated based on the Attack stats of the party Pokémon.
chineseDescription: 攻擊次數會依使用者同行寶可夢的數量而定。已陷入瀕死或異常狀態的寶可夢不計入。招式威力會依同行寶可夢的攻擊能力而定。

name: air-slash
description: Has a 30% chance of making the target flinch.
chineseDescription: 有30%的機率會讓對手畏縮。

name: ancient-power
description: Has a 10% chance of boosting the user's Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 有10%的機率會讓自己的攻擊、防禦、特攻、特防和速度能力各提高1階段。

name: beak-blast
description: If the user is hit by a contact move before it uses this move, the attacker will be burned.
chineseDescription: 如果自己在使出招式前受到接觸類招式攻擊，攻擊自己的寶可夢會陷入灼傷狀態。

name: flare-blitz
description: Has a 10% chance of burning the target. Cures the user of being frozen. The user also takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.
chineseDescription: 有10%的機率讓對手陷入灼傷狀態。治癒自身冰凍狀態。自身也會受到招式造成傷害的1/3。

name: heat-crash
description: The more the user outweighs the target, the greater this move’s power (ranging between 40 and 120). If the target has the Minimized status, this move’s power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.
chineseDescription: 自身比對手越重，招式威力越大。（威力40～120）如果對手處於變小狀態，招式威力會加倍，且必定命中。

name: meteor-beam
description: The user gains the Charging status, where the Pokémon spends 1 turn charging before using a move, on the turn this move is used, then attacks on the following turn. The user's Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 1 stage on the turn this move is used.
chineseDescription: 自身會先集氣1回合，下一回合發動攻擊。集氣時自身特攻會提高1階段。

name: salt-cure
description: Gives the target the Salt Cured status, where the Pokémon takes damage equal to 1/16 of its max HP at the end of every turn. If the Pokémon is a Steel type or Water type, it takes damage equal to 1/8 of its max HP instead.
chineseDescription: 讓對手陷入鹽醃狀態。對手每回合結束時會損失最大HP的1/16。如果對手是鋼屬性或水屬性，則會損失最大HP的1/8。

name: defog
description: Lowers the target's evasiveness by 1 stage. Removes statuses such as Reflect, Spikes, and Safeguard, as well as any terrain.
chineseDescription: 降低對手的閃避率1階段。解除場上的反射壁、撒菱、光牆、神秘守護等狀態，以及場地狀態。

name: electro-shot
description: The user gains the Charging status, where the Pokémon spends 1 turn charging before using a move, on the turn this move is used, then attacks on the following turn. In rain, the user does not gain the Charging status and can attack immediately. The user's Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 1 stage on the turn this move is used.
chineseDescription: 自身會先集氣1回合，下一回合發動攻擊。下雨天氣時，無需集氣即可發動攻擊。集氣時自身特攻會提高1階段。

name: attract
description: Gives the target the Infatuated status, where the Pokémon has a 50% chance of being unable to use moves while the Pokemon that gave the status is in the field. This move will fail against a target that is the same gender as the user or whose gender is unknown.
chineseDescription: 讓目標陷入著迷狀態。只要施招者在場上，目標就有50%的機率無法使出招式。對同性別或性別不明的寶可夢無效。

name: uproar
description: The user gains the Uproar status. For 3 turns, the Pokémon continues its attack and is unable to take any other actions. During this time, no Pokémon on the field can fall asleep.
chineseDescription: 在3回合內，使用者會持續攻擊，且無法採取其他行動。在此期間，場上所有寶可夢都無法陷入睡眠狀態。

name: wave-crash
description: The user takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.
chineseDescription: 使用者也會受到招式造成傷害的1/3。

name: baneful-bunker
description: The user protects itself from incoming moves for the turn. Any attackers that use contact moves against the user during this turn become poisoned. With each consecutive use, this move's chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.
chineseDescription: 讓自己不受招式影響。若對手使用接觸招式，會讓對手中毒。連續使用會降低成功率。

name: bitter-malice
description: Lowers the target's Attack stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 讓目標的攻擊能力降低1個階段。

name: brick-break
description: Removes the Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil statuses on the target’s side.
chineseDescription: 破壞目標場上的光牆、反射壁和極光幕。

name: burn-up
description: The user loses the Fire type. Cures the user of being frozen. This move fails unless it is used by a Fire type.
chineseDescription: 使用後自己會失去火屬性。解除自己的冰凍狀態。若自己不是火屬性，則招式會失敗。

name: counter
description: The user retaliates to deal double the damage it took from an opponent’s physical move during the turn this move is used.
chineseDescription: 在當回合受到對手物理招式攻擊時，會以2倍的傷害回敬對手。

name: copycat
description: The user mimics the move that was last used. This move fails if no other move has been used yet.
chineseDescription: 模仿上一個寶可夢使用的招式。若沒有招式被使用過則會失敗。

name: dragon-darts
description: The user attacks twice in a row. Ifthere are 2 opposing Pokémon, each of them is attacked once.
chineseDescription: 在１回合內連續攻擊２次。如果對手有２隻寶可夢，則會分別攻擊１次。

name: dragon-rush
description: Has a 20% chance of making the target flinch. If the target has the Minimized status, this move's power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.
chineseDescription: 有２０％的機率會使目標畏縮。如果目標處於變小狀態，招式威力會變成２倍，而且必定命中。

name: earth-power
description: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target’s Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 有10%的機率會降低對手特防1個階段。

name: dive
description: The user gains the Submerged status on the turn this move is used, where the Pokémon cannot be hit by most moves and is unaffected by terrain, then attacks on the following turn.
chineseDescription: 潛入水中，下個回合進行攻擊。潛水期間，除了特定的招式以外，不會受到任何招式的攻擊。

name: fickle-beam
description: This move has a 30% chance of its power being doubled.
chineseDescription: 有30%的機率招式威力會變為2倍。

name: fiery-dance
description: Has a 50% chance of boosting the user's Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 有50%的機率提高使用者的特攻。

name: flip-turn
description: After attacking, the user switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon.
chineseDescription: 攻擊後，自己會和同行寶可夢進行替換。

name: future-sight
description: Gives the target the Future Attack status, where the Pokémon in the targeted spot will take damage 2 turns after the status is activated.
chineseDescription: 2個回合後，會攻擊對手。

name: gigaton-hammer
description: This move can't be used twice in a row.
chineseDescription: 無法連續使用。

name: grav-apple
description: Lowers the target's Defense stat by 1 stage. This move's power is boosted by 50% when the Gravity status is active.
chineseDescription: 降低目標1階段的防禦。在重力狀態下，招式威力會提高50%。

name: hydro-cannon
description: The user gains the Recharging status on the turn after this move is used, where the user cannot take any actions for 1 turn.
chineseDescription: 使用後，下回合使用者會陷入無法動彈的狀態。

name: icy-wind
description: Lowers targets' Speed stats by 1 stage.
chineseDescription: 降低所有目標的速度1個階段。

name: imprison
description: The user gains the Sealing Off status, where any moves known by the Pokémon that caused this status cannot be used by its opponents.
chineseDescription: 使用者會陷入封印狀態，對手無法使用與使用者相同的招式。

name: instruct
description: The user makes the target reuse the last move it used.
chineseDescription: 讓對手再次使出剛才使出的招式。

name: life-dew
description: Restores 1/4 of the max HP of the user and its allies.
chineseDescription: 回復自己和所有我方寶可夢最大HP的1/4。

name: matcha-gotcha
description: Has a 20% chance of burning targets. The user's HP is restored by 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.
chineseDescription: 有20%的機率讓對手陷入灼傷狀態。給予對手的傷害會有一半轉化為自己的HP。

name: parting-shot
description: Lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage. The user then switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon.
chineseDescription: 降低對手攻擊和特攻1級。然後自身會替換。

name: payback
description: This move's power is double if the user attacks after the target.
chineseDescription: 如果自身在對手之後使出招式，招式威力會變為2倍。

name: moonlight
description: Restores 1/2 of the user's max HP. In harsh sunlight, 2/3 of its max HP will be restored instead. In all other weather conditions, 1/4 of its max HP will be restored instead.
chineseDescription: 回復自身最大HP的1/2。在大晴天時會回復2/3，在其他天氣時則會回復1/4。

name: psyshock
description: This is a special move, but the damage it deals is calculated using the target's Defense stat.
chineseDescription: 雖然是特殊招式，但會根據對手的防禦來計算傷害。

name: power-swap
description: The user swaps the changes to its Attack and Sp. Atk stats with the changes to the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats.
chineseDescription: 使用者和對手交換攻擊和特攻的能力變化。

name: rage-powder
description: The user redirects opponents' moves toward itself. This effect works only on single-target moves.
chineseDescription: 將對手招式的目標轉移到自己身上。只對單體攻擊招式有效。

name: round
description: If multiple Pokémon use this move in the same turn, the second user onward will act immediately after the first, and the power of the second Round onward will be doubled.
chineseDescription: 若多隻寶可夢在同一回合使用此招式，則第二隻寶可夢之後會緊接著第一隻寶可夢行動，且第二隻寶可夢之後的招式威力會變成2倍。

name: rest
description: Fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions. The user falls asleep for 2 turns. This move fails if the user's HP is full.
chineseDescription: 讓自己完全回復HP，並治癒所有異常狀態。自己會陷入2回合的睡眠狀態。若HP已滿則會失敗。

name: sludge-wave
description: Has a 10% chance of poisoning targets.
chineseDescription: 有10%的機率使周圍的寶可夢陷入中毒狀態。

name: solar-blade
description: The user gains the Charging status, where the Pokémon spends 1 turn charging before using a move, on the turn this move is used, on the turn this move is used, then attacks on the following turn. In harsh sunlight, the user does not gain the Charging status and can attack immediately. This move's power is halved in any other weather condition.
chineseDescription: 需在1回合內進行蓄力，下回合才能攻擊。在大晴天下，無須蓄力即可攻擊。在其他天氣下，招式威力會減半。

name: steel-roller
description: Removes any terrain. This move fails if there is no terrain on the field.
chineseDescription: 消除場地。場地上沒有場地招式時會失敗。

name: stone-axe
description: Gives the opponent's side the Stealth Rock status, where Pokémon that switch into battle will take damage equal to 1/8 of their max HP. This damage differs depending on the Pokémon's type matchup with the Rock type.
chineseDescription: 在對手場地設置隱形岩。替換上場的寶可夢會受到最大ＨＰ１／８的傷害，傷害量會因屬性相性而異。

name: teeter-dance
description: Confuses all other Pokémon on the field.
chineseDescription: 讓場上所有其他寶可夢陷入混亂狀態。

name: temper-flare
description: This move’s power is doubled if the user couldn’t act or its move missed or failed on the previous turn.
chineseDescription: 如果上一回合自己沒有行動，或招式沒有命中、失敗時，招式威力會變成２倍。

name: synthesis
description: Restores 1/2 of the user's max HP. In harsh sunlight, 2/3 of its max HP will be restored instead. In all other weather conditions, 1/4 of its max HP will be restored instead.
chineseDescription: 回復自己1/2的最大HP。在大晴天下，回復2/3最大HP。在其他天氣下，回復1/4最大HP。

name: whirlpool
description: Gives the target the Bound status, where the Pokémon takes 1/8 damage of its max HP at the end of every turn and it cannot switch out. This move's power is doubled if the target has the Submerged status.
chineseDescription: 讓目標陷入綁緊狀態。每回合結束時，目標會受到最大HP的1/8傷害，且無法替換。如果目標處於潛水狀態，招式威力會變成2倍。

name: ceaseless-edge
description: Gives the opponent's side the Spikes status, where Pokémon that are not Flying-types or have the Levitate ability that switch into battle will take damage equal to 1/8 of their max HP and will increase with each instance up to three times.
chineseDescription: 讓對手場地陷入撒菱狀態，不是飛行屬性或沒有飄浮特性的寶可夢替換上場時，會受到最大HP的1/8傷害，傷害會隨著撒菱的層數增加，最多3層。

name: disable
description: Gives the target the Move Disabled status for 4 turns, where the Pokémon cannot use whichever move it last used before getting the status.
chineseDescription: 讓目標陷入招式定身狀態，持續4回合，使其無法使用最後使用的招式。

name: dragon-tail
description: If there are other Pokémon in the target's party that can switch into battle, the target is forced to switch out of battle and is replaced by one of those Pokémon at random.
chineseDescription: 強制目標替換，並隨機替換出1隻寶可夢。

name: phantom-force
description: The user gains the Concealed status, where the Pokémon cannot be hit by moves and is unaffected by terrain, on the turn this move is used, then attacks on the following turn. This move can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect and removes the effects of those moves.
chineseDescription: 自身會消失在對手面前，大部分招式都無法命中，也不受場地狀態影響。下一回合發動攻擊。可以命中處於守住或看穿狀態的對手，並解除其效果。

name: axe-kick
description: Has a 30% chance of confusing the target. If this move misses or fails, the user takes damage equal to 1/2 of its max HP.
chineseDescription: 有30%的機率會讓對手陷入混亂狀態。如果招式沒有命中或失敗，自己會受到最大HP一半的傷害。

name: gravity
description: Gives the entire field the Gravity status for 5 turns. Gravity boosts the accuracy of moves by 67%, Pokémon such as Flying types or ones with the Levitate ability become grounded, and moves that involve flying or leaping cannot be used.
chineseDescription: 讓場地在5回合內陷入重力狀態。招式命中率會提高。飛行屬性寶可夢或飄浮特性的寶可夢會被強制落地，且無法使用飛翔或跳躍相關的招式。

name: endure
description: During the turn this move is used, if the user takes damage from a move that would knock it out, it will endure the hit with 1 HP. With each consecutive use, this move’s chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.
chineseDescription: 在這回合，即使受到會讓自己瀕死的招式攻擊，也能以1HP撐下來。連續使用會降低成功率。

name: kings-shield
description: The user protects itself from incoming attacks for the turn and changes into its Shield Forme. Any attackers that use contact moves against the user during this turn will have their Attack stats lowered by 1 stage. With each consecutive use, this move's chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.
chineseDescription: 在回合中保護自己，不受到任何招式的攻擊，並變成盾牌形態。如果對手使出接觸類招式，攻擊會降低1級。連續使出會容易失敗。

name: solar-beam
description: The user gains the Charging status, where the Pokémon spends 1 turn charging before using a move, on the turn this move is used, then attacks on the following turn. In harsh sunlight, the user does not gain the Charging status and can attack immediately. This move’s power is halved in any other weather condition.
chineseDescription: 需在1回合內進行蓄力，下回合才能攻擊。在大晴天下，無須蓄力即可攻擊。在其他天氣下，招式威力會減半。

name: shed-tail
description: The user loses 1/2 of its max HP to create a substitute, then switches out of battle to be replaced by another party Pokémon. The substitute will be hit by moves instead of that Pokémon, and it will vanish when it takes damage equal to 1/4 of the user's max HP.
chineseDescription: 消耗自己最大HP的1/2來製作替身，然後替換寶可夢。替身會代替自己承受攻擊，並在承受自己最大HP的1/4傷害後消失。

name: spikes
description: Gives the opponent's side the Spikes status, where Pokémon that are not Flying-types or have the Levitate ability that switch into battle will take damage equal to 1/8 of their max HP and will increase with each instance up to three times.
chineseDescription: 在對手場地撒下撒菱。非飛行屬性或不具飄浮特性的寶可夢登場時，會受到傷害。最多可撒３層，層數越多傷害越大。
